kickoff.goal: Position Cortland Westminster for GRESB technical-assessment points via a documented, verified decarbonization pathway that clears CO Reg 28 milestones within a 7-year hold

target.basis: Colorado Regulation 28 (HB21-1286): -7% GHG by 2026, -20% by 2030 vs 2021 baseline; >50k sf covered building

equipment_commitments: none planned; gas DHW (2014) and split AHUs w/ gas heat (2009) age naturally within hold

cap_rate.source: client guidance range 5.25-5.5%, Christopher, 2026-07-03; conservative end (5.5%) used for exit math, range noted

owner_tenant_gas_split.value: owner-paid $371,948/yr (100% of billed gas figure attributed to owner)

gfa.source: Agreement within rounding: Overture footprint-weighted helper dataset 724,081 ft2; AEI audit 724,079 ft2 (both recorded, difference immaterial, 724,081 used)

notes: Property resolved via list_properties (account-scoped, not bare list_buildings): property_uid 7d56c04e-ff1b-49bd-a918-14c36363a7cc = 'Cortland Westminster', 17 buildings.

get_equipment_survey and get_building_model_details both require building_model_uid (property_uid is rejected — validated by a live call that errored with 'Missing required argument: building_model_uid'). No property-scoped building-lookup tool exists (list_buildings is bare/account-wide and explicitly disallowed by the runbook). Building-level model details, equipment survey, and Audette-modeled emissions/EUI were therefore NOT pulled this phase.

ESPM pull deferred: Hindsight REST for ESPM not available to this agent; ESPM property id 17984313 actuals are outstanding and sit at the top of the reconciliation hierarchy — their absence means several 'agreed' baseline fields above (electricity, gas) are only audit-confirmed, not measured-actual-confirmed.
